name: Qualified Disclaimer to Optimize Estate Distribution

eligibility.description: Must meet the requirements of Section 2518, including being in writing and made within 9 months of the transfer, without the disclaimant accepting any benefits from the property.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: By making a qualified disclaimer of an inheritance, the assets pass to the next beneficiary as if the disclaimant had predeceased the decedent, avoiding double taxation and potential gift tax.
